firmware.title: Android System Update
firmware.description: T-Mobile is pleased to provide a new, free software update for your Android Smartphone. This update contains important device security improvements.  To install the software, make sure the battery is fully charged, connect to Wi-Fi if prompted to download (recommended), and once downloaded select “Restart & Install” at the bottom of this screen. Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing.
